Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump was designed in conjunction with Graco specifically to pump joint compound for high production drywall finishing applications. The Endurance Pump, MaxPower Motor and Advantage Drive System combine to create the most rugged and reliable pump on the market. The internal hopper filter maximizes material usage by allowing joint compound collected during the wipe down process to be re-used without fear of debris entering the pump. The 25 gallon hopper can be used as a tool wash station and includes an air tight lid so compound can be preserved for next day use. With the optional CTFIL, standard ATF tools can be filled while the continuous flow tools are in use. Also Available: CTEPMP: CFS Pump - Europe (230V / 50 Hz). Available through European Distributors and Dealers only. CTAPMP: CFS Pump - Australia (230V / 50 Hz) with 242005 adapter. Available through Australian and New Zealand Distributors and Dealers only. CTUPMP: CFS Pump - UK (110V). Available through UK Distributors and Dealers only.

Name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. When connected to the Continuous Flow Pump (CTPMP), this advanced taper simultaneously applies drywall tape and the correct amount of joint compound to all types of drywall joints. This combination of efficiency and precision makes it an indispensable tool for professional contractors. Key Features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper &nbsp; One of the standout features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is its inline handle with dual trigger, which enhances control and ease of use. Weighing just 7 pounds, it is lightweight enough to be maneuvered effortlessly, reducing user fatigue during extended use. The taper's design includes a creaser wheel, which ensures a perfect finish every time by embedding the tape securely into the joint compound. &nbsp; Additionally, the tool-less hose connection makes setup and disassembly quick and straightforward, saving valuable time on the job. For added convenience, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper can be paired with the CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control, allowing the user to manage the flow of joint compound from the pump to the taper with ease. &nbsp; Versatile Application &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is versatile, capable of handling various types of drywall joints with precision: - Butt Joints and Flat Joints: Whether you're working on walls or ceilings, the taper applies the joint compound and tape seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and professional finish. - Internal Corners: The taper is designed to efficiently handle internal corners on walls and ceilings, making it a comprehensive solution for all your drywall finishing needs. Advantages of Using the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper &nbsp; - Increased Efficiency: By applying both tape and joint compound simultaneously, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper significantly speeds up the drywall finishing process. This increased efficiency allows for more work to be completed in less time, enhancing productivity. - Consistent Quality: The precise application of joint compound and tape ensures a consistent, high-quality finish on every joint. This consistency reduces the need for additional touch-ups and sanding, saving both time and materials. - Ease of Use: The lightweight design and ergonomic inline handle make the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper easy to maneuver, even in tight spaces. The dual trigger system provides greater control over the application process, resulting in a more accurate and professional finish. - Quick Setup: The tool-less hose connection and wireless RF control simplify the setup and operation of the taper, allowing users to focus on the task at hand without worrying about complex equipment adjustments. &nbsp; Conclusion &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an essential tool for anyone involved in drywall installation and finishing. Its advanced features, combined with its lightweight and ergonomic design, make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are working on large-scale projects or smaller tasks, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper will help you achieve a flawless finish with minimal effort. Embrace the future of drywall finishing with the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper and experience unparalleled efficiency and quality in your work.

Description: The TapeTech CTVLV is part of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Drywall Finishing System. It attaches to the Continuous Flow Taper (T05CF) and the Continuous Flow Corner Finisher Handles (T14CF, T14EC) to provide wireless, radio frequency (RF) control of the flow of joint compound from the pump. Radio Frequency (RF) control "talks" to the pump without wires Thumb switch to easily adjust the flow of compound An integrated trigger for creaser wheel control

Name: CFS Replacement Hopper Filter
Description: The continuous flow tank filter fits into the bottom of the 95 liter filler tank of the CTPMP continuous flow pump. It prevents foreign bodies from getting into the pump so that the excess filler compound can be reused from the peeling phase of the drywall finishing. The tank filter is included in all continuous flow pumps. Prevents foreign objects from entering the Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump Keeps foreign objects out of the filler applied to walls and ceilings

Name: CFS Replacement Tire
Description: Replacement tire for the Continuous Flow Pump.

Name: CFS Tool Cleaning Coupling
Description: The CFS Tool Cleaning Coupling allows you to effectively clean the entire length of the Bazooka® Continuous Flow Taper, Finishing Box Handles and Corner Finisher Handles. The coupling (with Part 800826) is used in conjunction with the CNA-TT to fit snugly onto the CFS tool fittings and allow for thorough cleaning. There is no better way to keep your investment in continuous flow clean and running efficiently.

Name: CFS Z-Swivel Attachment
Description: The Z-Swivel attachment connects the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper, Finishing Box Handles and Corner Finisher Handles to the whip hose to provide kink-free operation and optimal maneuverability.

Name: ATF Tool Maintenance Kit
Description: Introducing a Tool Maintenance Kit, specifically designed by TapeTech, for Automatic Taping and Finishing Tools. "The right tools for the job." Whether you're doing routine maintenance or advanced repair, this one of a kind 12-piece Kit contains size-specific tools to get the job done right. Included in this kit are 4 Nut Drivers, 4 T-Handle Allen Keys, 1 Standard Hex Key, and 2 Custom Feeler Gauges (for calibrating the blades on finishing boxes and corner finishers). The foam-lined case keeps all your tools in one place, organized and protected, for storage or transport. The TapeTech ATF Tool Maintenance Kit is a must-have for all professional drywall finishers.

Name: Cleaning Nozzle Adapter
Description: The TapeTech Cleaning Nozzle Adapter makes cleaning the head of the Automatic Taper easy. The Adapter securely threads on to the Spray Nozzle and fits over the filler valve of the Automatic Taper to thoroughly clean the valve and the head without soaking the user. The Adapter can also be used to quickly clean the filler valve on the MudRunner® or Corner Applicators. Works with most brands of Automatic Tapers.

Name: Cleaning Nozzle
Description: The CFS Tool Cleaning Coupling allows you to effectively clean the entire length of the Bazooka® Continuous Flow Taper, Finishing Box Handles and Corner Finisher Handles. The coupling (with Part 800826) is used in conjunction with the CNA-TT to fit snugly onto the CFS tool fittings and allow for thorough cleaning. There is no better way to keep your investment in continuous flow clean and running efficiently.

Name: Gooseneck Cleaning Brush
Description: The TapeTech Gooseneck Cleaning Brush is specifically designed to keep the gooseneck clean for optimal operation. The brush is the ideal stiffness to effectively remove the compound while the shaft has the flexibility to navigate the challenging shape of the gooseneck adapter.

Name: Locking Wheel Kit for Mobile Wash Station
Description: Locking Wheel Kit for Mobile Wash Station This high-performance locking wheel kit will enhance your mobile wash station by offering secure positioning and easy mobility. This kit comes with four sturdy caster wheels, two of which have locking mechanisms to keep your wash station steady while in use, making it ideal for commercial or portable cleaning setups. Features: • Smooth Maneuverability: Swivel casters make it simple to move on a variety of surfaces, such as asphalt, tile, and concrete. • Dependable Braking System: The station is securely held in place by two wheels that are fitted with easy-use locks. • Sturdy Construction: Made from industrial-grade steel and rubber for long-lasting performance under heavy loads and damp conditions.

Name: Mobile Wash Station
Description: The TapeTech MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station is the lightest and most portable wash station available. It is the perfect solution for cleaning tools and equipment on the jobsite, especially when water supplies are limited. Working from just a 5-gallon bucket of water, the MWS01-TT generates the ideal water pressure to effectively clean drywall finishing tools, paint brushes, rollers, pans and more! The MWS01-TT also helps finishers and painters comply with environmental laws by providing a convenient, professional wash station that does not wash the joint compound or paint into the soil. The legs of the MWS01-TT open and close effortlessly for quick set up, break down and transport. The MWS01-TT weighs just 34 pounds. Features: Improved pump that only circulates while the trigger is being operated, extending the life of the pump and providing twice the cleaning power of the original pump Improved spray hose &amp; nozzle with more control over pressure and directional spray Now includes Accessory Kit (MWS-ACC) with basket, drain riser, and nozzle brush to dry your tools, keep compound out of your water bucket, and remove stubborn compound Locking Wheel Kit – MWS01-LW also included lets you easily move your Mobile Wash Station around and lock when needed

Name: MWS Accessory Kit
Description: TapeTech has now included a new Accessory Kit with every Wash Station purchased. The kit includes: a. Hanging Basket – to keep your already cleaned tools clean and allows them to hang to dry. Features: Hanging Basket – Allows your already clean tools to stay clean and not be put back into the basin with other tools. The basket allows for the tools to begin drying while hanging. The basket can be hung at various locations on the wash basin. Nozzle Brush – The brush simply snaps onto the end of the spray nozzle. When used in combination with the spray nozzle, the new brush helps remove stubborn compound faster. The brush also acts as a splash shield against over spray. Drain Riser – The drain riser is inserted into the metal drain in the basin and helps to prevent compound from draining into the bucket, keeping your water cleaner longer. By removing the riser, the retained compound can now be drained into a disposal bucket.

Name: Pump Tube Cleaning Brush
Description: The TapeTech Pump Tube Cleaning Brush is specifically designed to quickly and efficiently clean the main tube of the loading pump. The brush is perfectly sized for the tube’s diameter and the bristles are the ideal stiffness to clean without damaging the tube. The brush attaches to any length handle with a standard ¾” Acme thread.

Name: Quick-Connect Adapter
Description: The TapeTech Quick-Connect Adapter makes it easy to use the CN-TT Cleaning Nozzle with quick-connect garden hose systems commonly found in Europe and other countries. Simply thread the adapter into the bottom of the CN-TT Cleaning Nozzle.

Name: MWS Spray Hose Kit
Description: The NEW Spray Hose Kit has been improved to offer a number of features for the MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station. Features: Improved Nozzle – New pressure adjustment on the nozzle allows for the proper amount of water pressure for the specific cleaning application. There is also a directional feature of where to spray. Hose – A more robust hose has been added to the kit and will now be the standard option packed in the box. Upgraded Brass Connectors – New and improved connectors have been added to the hose for attachment to the MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station.

Name: Taper Cable Repair Tool
Description: Are you tired of always trying to find something to push the plunger through the tube when repairing your taper cable? The TapeTech Taper Cable repair Tool is designed to easily fit in your tool box or tool bag and is the correct length for quickly pushing the plunger without damaging the main taper tube. This tool is a must-have to reduce downtime due to worn or broken cables. Stop wasting time looking around your garage or jobsite and get the right tool for the job.

Name: Taper Tube Cleaning Brush
Description: The TapeTech Taper Tube Cleaning Brush is specifically designed to quickly and efficiently clean the main tube of the Automatic Taper. The brush is perfectly sized for the tube’s diameter and the bristles are the ideal stiffness to clean without damaging the tube. The brush attaches to any length handle with a standard ¾” Acme thread.

Great place to start for hand finishers that want to increase speed, and a great value for seasoned drywall pros. Functions: Finishes joints on walls and ceilings (extra reach with Xtender) Most popular TapeTech finishing kit 5 Year TapeTech Warranty Includes: 10" EZ Clean™ Flat Box EZ10TT 12" EZ Clean™ Flat Box EZ12TT Loading Pump 76TT Flat Box Filler 90TT Flat Box Xtender Handle 88TTE

Description: TapeTech Basic Taping Set TTBTS Pre-packaged Taping Set gives the drywall professional or remodeler everything necessary to string tape and complete first coat finish on corners. TapeTech drywall tools for taping and complete finishing of drywall corners, flats and butt joints. TapeTech Taping Tools are known worldwide, and can be considered the most recognized drywall tools for automatic taping and finishing. Tape Tech Taping Tools by Ames offer a 5 year warranty against manufacturer defects. Functions: Finishes tape on inside corners 5 Year TapeTech Warranty Includes: 3" EZ Roll™ Adjustable Corner Finisher 48TT 8" Corner Applicator CA08TT Loading Pump 76TT Flat Box Filler 90TT Extendable Handle XHTT

Description: TapeTech MudRunner Corner Finishing Set TTCFS-M Pre-packaged drywall corner finishing kit configured with the most popular size Corner finisher. Includes MudRunner Corner Applicator. The MudRunner is the easiest angle box or corner applicator that you will ever use. Because you don't have to expend effort squeezing out compound by forcing the tool into the corner. A great value for seasoned drywall pros. Functions: Finishes tape fast and efficiently on inside corners 5 Year TapeTech Warranty Includes: 3" EZ Roll™ Adjustable Corner Finisher 48TT MudRunner Applicator 14TT Loading Pump 76TT Flat Box Filler 90TT

Name: Paper Faced Bead Pro Set TTPFB
Description: Description TapeTech Paper Faced Bead Pro Set TTPFB Pre-packaged Paper Faced Bead set includes the MudRunner Corner Applicator. The MudRunner is the easiest angle box or corner applicator that you will ever use. Because you don’t have to expend effort squeezing out compound by forcing the tool into the corner. The Outside Corner Roller to firmly embed paper-faced corner bead on external drywall corners. The 90°Outside Corner Mud Head and 90°Inside Corner Mud Head apply a consistent base coat of joint compound on internal and external corners. The Extendable XHTT Handle reaches from 43″-77″. This is a great set for any drywall professional. Functions: Applies compound both inside or outside corners Perfect for installing paper-faced bead products 5 Year TapeTech Warranty Includes: MudRunner Applicator 14TT Outside Corner Roller 17TT 90°Outside Corner Mud Head 16TT 90°Inside Corner Mud Head 16TT90 Loading Pump 76TT Flat Box Filler 90TT Corner Finisher Adaptor CFATT Extendable Handle XHTT
